untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calculation of 'trending_time_percentage' over 126 periods and regime-switching logic with dynamic 50% scaling exits based on mid-position regime changes. This requires custom composite indicators (trending_time_pct) and conditional position sizing that cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and binary operators. The regime-blend ratio (70% trend vs 70% reversion) requires multi-rule weighting logic not supported by standard backtest condition syntax.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using ADX_14 as proxy for trend strength detection: entry when ADX>=30 (strong trend), exit when ADX<20 (trend weakening). However, this does NOT capture: (1) the 126-period trending_time_percentage calculation, (2) the conditional switch between trend-following and range-based rules, (3) the dynamic 50% scale-out on regime switches, or (4) the 70/30 blend ratios. The original signal is a meta-strategy framework requiring rule-switching logic, not a simple entry/exit condition. Recommend implementing as custom algorithm outside standard backtest engine.
